items.title_en: What is Pickaxe Mountain, the Iranian nuclear facility Trump is threatening to strike?
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁要袭击的镐山核设施是什么？
items.desc_en: "We'll be hitting that area pretty soon, and very heavily," President Donald Trump said about Iran's underground nuclear facility in Pickaxe Mountain.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在谈到伊朗位于镐山的地下核设施时表示：“我们很快就会对那个地区进行非常严厉的打击。”

items.title_en: More warehouses of Russian online retailer Wildberries hit by Ukraine, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，俄罗斯在线零售商Wildberry的更多仓库受到乌克兰袭击
items.desc_en: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in Krasnodar and Stavropol were struck overnight on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 周二夜间，位于克拉斯诺达尔和斯塔夫罗波尔的 Wildberry 物流中心遭到袭击。

items.title_en: Japan temperatures soar over 40C, marking first 'cruelly hot day'
items.title_zh: 日本气温飙升逾40摄氏度，迎来首个“酷热日”
items.desc_en: The term was introduced in April by the weather agency to describe days when temperatures reach 40C.
items.desc_zh: 该术语由气象局于 4 月份引入，用于描述气温达到 40 摄氏度的日子。

items.title_en: Zelenskyy ousts Ukraine’s army chief as protests expose wartime power struggle
items.title_zh: 抗议活动暴露战时权力斗争，泽连斯基罢免乌克兰陆军参谋长
items.desc_en: The reshuffle comes after almost a week of nationwide unrest and represents one of the biggest political crises since Russia's full-scale invasion in 2022.
items.desc_zh: 这次改组是在全国范围内发生近一周的骚乱之后进行的，这是自俄罗斯 2022 年全面入侵以来最大的政治危机之一。

items.title_en: Wall Street can wait: Why one U.S. biotech firm is listing in Hong Kong first
items.title_zh: 华尔街可以等待：为什么一家美国生物科技公司首先在香港上市
items.desc_en: Global biotech firms are increasingly being drawn to Hong Kong for its growing investor base and proximity to Chinese pharmaceutical partners.
items.desc_zh: 由于香港不断增长的投资者基础以及靠近中国制药合作伙伴的优势，全球生物技术公司越来越多地被吸引到香港。

items.title_en: Rebel Wilson cleared in defamation case brought by actress in her own film
items.title_zh: 蕾蓓尔·威尔逊 (Rebel Wilson) 在自己电影中的女演员提起的诽谤案中被洗清
items.desc_en: Wilson was accused of defaming young Australian actress Charlotte MacInnes, but cleared by a Sydney court.
items.desc_zh: 威尔逊被指控诽谤年轻的澳大利亚女演员夏洛特·麦金尼斯，但被悉尼法院证实无罪。

items.title_en: House passes bill to fund the government until after midterm elections - The Washington Post
items.title_zh: 众议院通过法案，为政府提供资金直至中期选举后 - 《华盛顿邮报》
items.desc_en: House passes bill to fund the government until after midterm elections  The Washington PostHouse passes temporary government funding bill months early to avoid election season shutdown  AP NewsHouse N
items.desc_zh: 众议院通过法案，为政府提供资金直至中期选举结束。《华盛顿邮报》提前几个月通过临时政府拨款法案，以避免选举季停摆。美联社 NewsHouse N

items.title_en: Trump's push for American-made AI chips hits TSMC's margins
items.title_zh: 特朗普推动美国制造的人工智能芯片打击台积电的利润
items.desc_en: The Taiwan-based chipmaker has announced $200 billion in investment into U.S. manufacturing since Trump returned to power in 2025.
items.desc_zh: 自特朗普 2025 年重新掌权以来，这家台湾芯片制造商已宣布对美国制造业投资 2000 亿美元。

items.title_en: India steps up energy shift as costs and tariff pressures mount — oil blending push sparks backlash
items.title_zh: 随着成本和关税压力加大，印度加快能源转型——石油混合推动引发强烈反对
items.desc_en: India is banking on alternative fuels as it prioritizes energy security amid high oil prices and supply constraints.
items.desc_zh: 印度寄希望于替代燃料，因为在高油价和供应紧张的情况下，印度优先考虑能源安全。

items.title_en: Tehran's Hormuz threat risks global fallout, Rubio warns as U.S. strikes Iran for 11th straight night
items.title_zh: 鲁比奥警告称，德黑兰的霍尔木兹威胁可能会影响全球，因为美国已连续第11晚袭击伊朗
items.desc_en: His comments come as U.S. Central Command hit Iranian targets for an 11th straight night.
items.desc_zh: 他发表此番言论之际，美国中央司令部已连续第 11 个晚上袭击伊朗目标。

items.title_en: Wistron shares surge in Taiwan after opening of Texas AI superchip plant to supply Nvidia
items.title_zh: 纬创资通在德克萨斯州开设人工智能超级芯片工厂供应英伟达后，台湾股价飙升
items.desc_en: Taiwan’s Wistron Corporation opens first U.S. facility in Fort Worth, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 台湾纬创资通公司在德克萨斯州沃斯堡开设了第一家美国工厂。

items.title_en: Mamdani says he won't try to arrest Israel's Netanyahu, acknowledges NYC doesn't have legal authority - CBS News
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼表示他不会试图逮捕以色列内塔尼亚胡，承认纽约市没有法律权力 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻
items.desc_en: Mamdani says he won't try to arrest Israel's Netanyahu, acknowledges NYC doesn't have legal authority  CBS NewsMamdani Calls Netanyahu a ‘War Criminal’ and Calls on U.S. to Arrest Him  The New York Ti
items.desc_zh: 马姆达尼表示，他不会试图逮捕以色列内塔尼亚胡，承认纽约市没有法律权力 CBS 新闻马姆达尼称内塔尼亚胡为“战犯”，并呼吁美国逮捕他

items.title_en: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
items.title_zh: 法国通过法律禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.desc_zh: 该法律将要求法国的社交媒体平台从一月份起验证所有用户的年龄。

items.title_en: Michelin-starred restaurateur faces jail for using ants as dessert garnish
items.title_zh: 米其林星级餐厅老板因使用蚂蚁作为甜点装饰而面临牢狱之灾
items.desc_en: Officials say the restaurant in South Korea used some 49,000 ants in various dishes over four years.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，这家韩国餐厅四年来在各种菜肴中使用了约 49,000 只蚂蚁。

items.title_zh: 卢比奥称美国仍愿意就伊朗危机进行谈判 - 路透中文网

items.title_zh: 美联社两名消息人士称，特朗普批准可能允许沙特阿拉伯浓缩铀的核协议 - 美联社新闻

items.title_zh: 赫格斯估计伊朗战争成本已达 375 亿美元 - 纽约时报中文网

items.desc_zh: 赫格斯估计伊朗战争的成本已达 375 亿美元《纽约时报》在伊朗问题上，标价 370 亿美元，但如何结束伊朗战争却没有答案，赫格斯说，CNNUS 迄今为止在伊朗的战争成本已达 375 亿美元

items.title_en: US renews strikes on Iran as Trump threatens to attack underground nuclear site
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁攻击地下核设施，美国再次对伊朗发动打击
items.desc_en: The US president's threat to target a key Iranian nuclear site came ahead of the 11th consecutive night of attacks.
items.desc_zh: 在连续 11 晚发生袭击之前，美国总统威胁要袭击伊朗的一个重要核设施。

items.title_zh: 众议员安迪·比格斯赢得亚利桑那州州长共和党初选 - Politico

items.title_en: Gruesome images in D4vd hearing are 'worst nightmare' for teen girl's family
items.title_zh: D4vd 听证会上的可怕图像对少女的家人来说是“最糟糕的噩梦”
items.desc_en: The court hears the singer ordered a body bag, chainsaws and an inflatable pool to dispose of the teen's body.
items.desc_zh: 法庭获悉，这位歌手订购了一个裹尸袋、电锯和一个充气水池来处理青少年的尸体。

items.title_en: These Japanese AI winners don’t make chips. They make toilets, glass fiber and seasoning
items.title_zh: 这些日本人工智能赢家并不生产芯片。他们制造厕所、玻璃纤维和调味料
items.desc_en: A toilet maker, a glass fiber manufacturer and the maker of MSG have in Japan have become major beneficiaries of the AI boom.
items.desc_zh: 日本的马桶制造商、玻璃纤维制造商和味精制造商已成为人工智能热潮的主要受益者。

items.title_en: Iran war has cost US $37.5bn so far, Hegseth says, as Pentagon seeks billions more
items.title_zh: 赫格斯表示，伊朗战争迄今已造成 375 亿美元损失，五角大楼正在寻求数十亿美元的额外援助
items.desc_en: The hearing was disrupted by protests and a shouting match as Hegseth testified at a pivotal time in the war.
items.desc_zh: 赫格斯在战争的关键时刻作证时，听证会因抗议和争吵而中断。

items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基解雇乌克兰陆军参谋长并为费多罗夫提供“显要职位” - 英国卫报

items.title_en: Trump plans steep tariffs on generic drugs starting in 2028 to spur U.S. production
items.title_zh: 特朗普计划从 2028 年开始对仿制药征收高额关税，以刺激美国生产
items.desc_en: The phased schedule is intended to push generic drugmakers to move production onshore.
items.desc_zh: 该分阶段计划旨在推动仿制药制造商将生产转移到境内。

items.title_en: Nike to cut off thousands of online distributors in China, restructure digital footprint
items.title_zh: 耐克将切断中国数千家在线分销商，重组数字足迹
items.desc_en: Nike is streamlining its online business in China as the company looks to stabilize pricing and branding and get back to growth.
items.desc_zh: 耐克正在精简其在中国的在线业务，以稳定定价和品牌并恢复增长。

items.title_en: Capital One earnings were good enough but didn't answer the big question hanging over the stock
items.title_zh: 第一资本的盈利足够好，但没有回答困扰该股的大问题
items.desc_en: Investors want to know when Capital One will begin to see more tangible benefits from its Discover and Brex deals.
items.desc_zh: 投资者想知道第一资本何时开始从 Discover 和 Brex 交易中看到更多切实的好处。

items.title_en: The world's top fintech companies: 2026
items.title_zh: 全球顶尖金融科技公司：2026
items.desc_en: Fintech is entering an era of scale and maturity, just as AI forces innovation. CNBC and Statista name the key players shaping the industry — and shaking it up.
items.desc_zh: 正如人工智能推动创新一样，金融科技正在进入规模化、成熟化的时代。 CNBC 和 Statista 列出了塑造该行业并撼动该行业的关键参与者。

items.title_en: Tokyo urges men to wear shorts to work, but some women say it's 'leg hair harassment'
items.title_zh: 东京敦促男性穿短裤上班，但一些女性称这是“腿毛骚扰”
items.desc_en: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government wants workers to ditch the suit and tie for t-shirts, trainers - and shorts.
items.desc_zh: 东京都政府希望工人们抛弃西装和领带，改穿 T 恤、运动鞋和短裤。

items.desc_en: Many server makers are seeing faster growth as companies race to deploy artificial intelligence servers.
items.desc_zh: 随着公司竞相部署人工智能服务器，许多服务器制造商都看到了更快的增长。

items.title_zh: 韩国股市的抛售可能很快就会平息。这对美国市场来说可能是个好消息
items.desc_en: South Korea's stock market could be turning around — and some investors expect its U.S. counterpart won't be far behind.
items.desc_zh: 韩国股市可能会出现好转，一些投资者预计美国股市也不会落后太多。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.title_en: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
items.title_zh: 经过数天的抗议后，泽伦斯基解雇了乌克兰最高陆军司令
items.desc_en: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after days of unrest over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

items.title_en: Two French firefighters die tackling blaze near Bordeaux airport
items.title_zh: 两名法国消防员在波尔多机场附近扑灭大火时丧生
items.desc_en: The blaze close to the parking lots at Bordeaux-Mérignac Airport is said to have originated from a brush fire.
items.desc_zh: 波尔多梅里尼亚克机场停车场附近的大火据说是由灌木丛火灾引起的。

items.title_en: Israeli air strike in Gaza City kills family of six, medics say
items.title_zh: 医务人员称，以色列对加沙城的空袭造成一家六口死亡
items.desc_en: Firas al-Masri, his wife and their four children died in the attack, which the Israeli military says targeted a Hamas operative.
items.desc_zh: 费拉斯·马斯里、他的妻子和四个孩子在这次袭击中丧生，以色列军方称这次袭击的目标是一名哈马斯特工。

items.title_en: Dozens hurt in Bologna protests after man dies while being restrained by police
items.title_zh: 博洛尼亚抗议活动中，一名男子被警察制服后死亡，数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Thousands of people took to the streets demanding justice for a Moroccan-born man who died on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 数千人走上街头，要求为周日去世的一名摩洛哥出生的男子伸张正义。

items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱

items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。
